unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Some interesting facts about the Summer Olympics
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：f + act（行动/做） -> 做过的事情就是“事实；真相”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: 79-year-old Hiroshi competed at the Tokyo 2020 Olympics.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：com（共同）+ pete（追求/寻找） -> 共同追求，即“竞争；参加比赛”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: A student has saved £3,000 on travel costs by staying in people's homes as a pet sitter while traveling across Europe.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：s + ave（大街） -> 走在街上要“节省；节约”钱财。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The app allows people to stay in homes around the world for free as long as they look after the owner's pet.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：for（为了）+ free（免费/自由） -> 免费地。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The app allows people to stay in homes around the world for free as long as they look after the owner's pet.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：own（拥有）+ er（人） -> 拥有者，即“物主；主人”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She said she highly recommended pet-sitting to people.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：high（高的）+ ly（副词后缀） -> 高度地，非常，很。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Condori thought of the idea after seeing his classmates throw away many old toys every year.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：think（想）+ of（关于） -> 想出；构思出。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: And the number is still rising.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：字母r像发芽的小草，向上“增加；增长；提高”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Owls are birds that feed on small creatures, like mice, bats and frogs.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：feed（喂养）+ on（依靠） -> 依靠……来喂养，即“以……为食”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They have good eyesight and sharp hearing.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：eye（眼睛）+ sight（视力/看见） -> 视力；目力。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They can come at other small creatures without any noise with the help of their soft feathers.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：come（来）+ at（对着/目标） -> 冲着目标来，即“扑向；向……逼近”。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: at all times vs at times
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They have a pair of big round eyes that make them look awake at all times.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：at（在）+ all（所有）+ times（时间/时刻） -> 在所有时刻，即“随时；总是”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: And they are also mentioned in the saying, "As wise as an owl."
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：men（男人）+ tion（名词/动词化后缀） -> 男人们在一起“提到；说到”各种话题。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Nice photos show how a farmer used 250,000 sunflowers to create a fun trail in his field, bringing in visitors around the world.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：fi + eld（old的变体） -> 在古老（old）的大地上开辟出的“田；地；牧场”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: "I started with 10 acres, but now we're up to about 13.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：up（向上）+ to（到） -> 向上到达，即“达到”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: "It offers a photo chance and people love it," said Crawford.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：ch + ance（名词后缀） -> 把握这次“机会；机遇”。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: under control vs out of control
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: "But now it's under control," he added.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：under（在……之下）+ control（控制） -> 处于控制之下。
